com.hp.workpath.api.scanner

Class FileOptionsAttributesCaps

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.FileOptionsAttributesCaps

  • public final class FileOptionsAttributesCaps
extends java.lang.Object
    File options which are available from device.
    Since:
    API 1

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.List<FileOptionsAttributes.OcrLanguage> getOcrLanguageList()
      Gets supported PDF OCR languages
      java.util.List<FileOptionsAttributes.PdfCompressionMode> getPdfCompressionModeList()
      Gets supported PDF compression modes
      java.util.List<FileOptionsAttributes.TiffCompressionMode> getTiffCompressionModeList()
      Gets supported TIFF compression modes
      java.util.List<FileOptionsAttributes.XpsCompressionMode> getXpsCompressionModeList()
      Gets supported XPS compression modes
      boolean isPdfEncryptionPasswordSupported()
      Returns supported option of PDF encryption

    • Method Detail

      • isPdfEncryptionPasswordSupported

        public boolean isPdfEncryptionPasswordSupported()
        Returns supported option of PDF encryption
        Returns:
        true if PDF encryption supported

        • If encryption is supported, method returns true.
        • If encryption is not supported, method returns false.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getPdfCompressionModeList

        public java.util.List<FileOptionsAttributes.PdfCompressionMode> getPdfCompressionModeList()
        Gets supported PDF compression modes
        Returns:
        the PDF compression modes supported.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the PdfCompressionMode from FileOptionsAttributes.PdfCompressionMode
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getOcrLanguageList

        public java.util.List<FileOptionsAttributes.OcrLanguage> getOcrLanguageList()
        Gets supported PDF OCR languages
        Returns:
        the PDF OCR languages supported.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the OcrLanguage from FileOptionsAttributes.OcrLanguage
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getTiffCompressionModeList

        public java.util.List<FileOptionsAttributes.TiffCompressionMode> getTiffCompressionModeList()
        Gets supported TIFF compression modes
        Returns:
        the TIFF compression modes supported.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the TiffCompressionMode from FileOptionsAttributes.TiffCompressionMode
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getXpsCompressionModeList

        public java.util.List<FileOptionsAttributes.XpsCompressionMode> getXpsCompressionModeList()
        Gets supported XPS compression modes
        Returns:
        the XPS compression modes supported.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the XpsCompressionMode from FileOptionsAttributes.XpsCompressionMode
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 1
